name: TableRow
summary: A TableColumn is a single row from a table.

properties.name: bottom_edge_style
properties.summary: The #bottom_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableRow's bottom edge.
properties.remarks: The #bottom_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableRow's bottom edge.

properties.name: height
properties.summary: The #height method returns the height of the Layout::TableRow.
properties.remarks: The #height method returns the height of the Layout::TableRow.

properties.name: top_edge_style
properties.summary: The #top_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableRow's top edge.
properties.remarks: The #top_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableRow's top edge.
